item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 clearly fires the anti-spiral brake against adding a fourth permanent manual checkpoint and reframes the issue as repeated local patching. It allows only a bounded emergency exception with all three required elements: limited to the day/batch, no long-term role or baseline lift, and a structural repair deadline. Turn 2 keeps that brake active under pressure and again includes one-time scope, no baseline lift, and a concrete structural repair deadline."}
